title: QOL Advanced (Update)
description: Give Minecraft A Fresh Feeling By Adding Features Mojang Should have added A Long Time Ago (New update I have decided to continue making QOL Advanced to be better and faster than last time)
body: Play Minecraft The Way It Should Be Played Sideways slabs, Sleeping bags, Crying obsidian portals, Combining Elytra And So Much More This Will Be The Best QOL (Quality Of Life) Mod Ever
